assertionResults.fullName: coreTaskCancel (engine, with live T877 trigger) cancels a pending task and stamps cancelledAt + cancellationReason
assertionResults.title: cancels a pending task and stamps cancelledAt + cancellationReason

assertionResults.fullName: coreTaskCancel (engine, with live T877 trigger) T9838 regression: cancels a task whose pipelineStage is contribution
assertionResults.title: T9838 regression: cancels a task whose pipelineStage is contribution

assertionResults.fullName: coreTaskCancel (engine, with live T877 trigger) is idempotent: re-cancelling returns alreadyCancelled
assertionResults.title: is idempotent: re-cancelling returns alreadyCancelled

assertionResults.fullName: coreTaskCancel (engine, with live T877 trigger) blocks parent cancellation unless child propagation is explicit
assertionResults.title: blocks parent cancellation unless child propagation is explicit

assertionResults.fullName: coreTaskCancel (engine, with live T877 trigger) cascades cancellation to descendants only when children=cascade is explicit
assertionResults.title: cascades cancellation to descendants only when children=cascade is explicit

assertionResults.fullName: coreTaskCancel (engine, with live T877 trigger) orphans direct children when children=orphan is explicit
assertionResults.title: orphans direct children when children=orphan is explicit

assertionResults.fullName: coreTaskCancel (engine, with live T877 trigger) requires force waiver and audit log for large subtree cascade
assertionResults.title: requires force waiver and audit log for large subtree cascade

assertionResults.fullName: taskCancel (dispatch wrapper, error mapping) returns E_NOT_FOUND when the task does not exist
assertionResults.title: returns E_NOT_FOUND when the task does not exist

assertionResults.fullName: taskCancel (dispatch wrapper, error mapping) returns E_INVALID_STATE for a completed task (not E_NOT_FOUND)
assertionResults.title: returns E_INVALID_STATE for a completed task (not E_NOT_FOUND)

assertionResults.fullName: taskCancel (dispatch wrapper, error mapping) returns success on a real cancel and again on idempotent re-cancel
assertionResults.title: returns success on a real cancel and again on idempotent re-cancel
